entries.quote: The next phase will be defined by AI capable of understanding, predicting, and acting before customers even raise a request
entries.signal: IDFC FIRST is positioning AI as the core competitive lever for next-gen banking—predictive capabilities before customer request, signaling tech-first differentiation in retail deposits and engagement.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management sees AI-driven predictive banking as table-stakes for market leadership; expects customer-first intent + technology integration to drive deposit and loyalty growth (customer deposits ₹2.84 Lakh Cr in FY26).
